info.title: D-Sports API
info.description: Public API for the D-Sports fan engagement platform (PWA backend). Most endpoints require Clerk Bearer authentication.

tags.name: Misc
tags.description: Image proxy, crypto prices, upload, feedback

tags.name: Auth and onboarding
tags.description: Domain grouping for auth, profile, onboarding, and identity flows

tags.name: Social and locker room
tags.description: Domain grouping for social feed, follows, and community interactions

tags.name: Gamification
tags.description: Domain grouping for quests, leaderboards, points-facing outcomes, and rewards

tags.name: Commerce and purchases
tags.description: Domain grouping for checkout, cash balance, webhooks, and store purchase flows

tags.name: Collectibles and packs
tags.description: Domain grouping for pack lifecycle and collectible inventory

tags.name: Wallet and web3
tags.description: Domain grouping for wallet and crypto-support operations

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: User notification inbox, read status, and archival

tags.name: Games
tags.description: Interactive games: Daily Spin, Guess the Player, Pick'em

tags.name: Leagues
tags.description: League metadata, colors, and team groupings

tags.name: Moderation and reporting
tags.description: Domain grouping for user-facing report submission and moderation-adjacent endpoints

tags.name: Platform and infrastructure
tags.description: Domain grouping for utility, infrastructure, and platform support endpoints

post.description: Generates a sign-in token for the authenticated user. Used by native app: pass Bearer token, get ticket for WebView sign-in.
Validates the Bearer token.

get.description: Redirects to login.

post.description: Signs out the user.

get.description: Redirects to mobile auth. Query: provider, redirect_uri.
Callback with redirect_uri. Returns token or error in redirect.
Verifies Bearer token from native app.

List all teams with enriched stats: fans, totalPoints, rank, lastWinner, isOfficial, league, themeColor, leaderboardId (per-team board when provisioned), leagueInfo, leagueColors, plus _count { packs, collectibles }.
Teams the authenticated user follows.

post.description: Body optional: { type?: 'followed' | 'fan' }.

get.description: Returns leaderboard entries. Query: leaderboardId (number) or teamId (string); omit for global.
Server-sent events stream. Query: leaderboardId.
Total users, total points, last winner.

post.description: Body: { paymentMethod: 'crypto' | 'dsports-cash' }.
Body: { purchaseId }.

get.description: suggest=1: suggested users (auth). No id: current user (auth). id and/or handle: public profile.

post.description: Onboarding payload.

get.description: Internal/debug card settings endpoint.

post.description: Internal/debug card settings mutation endpoint.

password.description: Optional password for explicit re-authentication prior to deletion.

get.description: Query: category (optional) for QuestCategory; else active quests.
Query: userId (admin impersonation).

post.description: Handles RevenueCat purchase events. Use Authorization: Bearer with REVENUECAT_WEBHOOK_SECRET.
Internal maintenance route for quest/points reconciliation.

get.description: Paginated notification inbox for the authenticated user. Filterable by read status.

patch.description: Marks every unread notification as read for the authenticated user.
Mark a single notification as read. Archived notifications keep their ARCHIVED status but readAt is set.
Archive a single notification. Also sets readAt if not already read.

post.description: Claim a daily spin reward. Coin rewards: 150 points (max 5/day). Weekly set rewards: 500 points (once per week). Idempotent.

weekStartDate.description: YYYY-MM-DD, required when rewardType is weekly_set

200.description: { success, data: { pointsAwarded, rewardType, alreadyAwarded, leaderboardUpdates } }

post.description: Start a new Guess the Player game session. Returns a session with clue data.
Submit a guess for an active Guess the Player session.
Abandon an active Guess the Player session. The reason is stored for analytics.

get.description: Returns players available for the Pick'em game with tier, stats, and images.
Returns the current user's settings (privacy, appearance, accessibility, notifications). Creates defaults if none exist.

patch.description: Update any subset of user settings. Changing privateProfile also syncs the User model.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's block list with public profile info.

post.description: Block a user. Idempotent via upsert.

400.description: blockedUserId required or cannot block yourself

delete.description: Remove a user from block list. Accepts blockedUserId via query or body.

get.description: Returns up to 50 most recent data export requests for the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a GDPR-style data export request.

get.description: Returns all push notification device registrations for the authenticated user.

post.description: Upsert a push subscription keyed by (userId, platform). Also updates lastSeenAt.

delete.description: Remove all push subscriptions for the given platform.

get.description: Case-insensitive check whether a handle is available. Used during onboarding and profile editing.
Paginated list of all onboarded users (newest first). Excludes the current user. Rate-limited to 30 req/min.

schema.description: Set to 'true' to exclude already-followed users

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's support tickets with message counts.

post.description: Create a new support ticket and send an email notification to the support team.

get.description: Retrieve the message thread for a support ticket owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Add a reply to a support ticket. Reopens the ticket if it was closed.

put.description: Edit a locker-room post. Author only. Max 280 characters.

delete.description: Delete a locker-room post. Author only.

put.description: Edit a comment on a locker-room post. Author only.

delete.description: Delete a comment on a locker-room post. Author only.

get.description: Generate a one-time SIWE-style challenge message for linking an external wallet.

post.description: Verify a signed challenge and link an external wallet to the authenticated user's account.

400.description: Missing fields, signature expired/mismatch, or address already linked

get.description: Canonical odds disclosure for a pack. Returns drop rates, expected outcomes, and guarantee information.

200.description: { success, data: { packId, packName, packTier, dropRates, expectedOutcomes, guarantee, isOpenable, generatedAt } }

post.description: Report a user, post, or comment. At least one target (targetUserId, targetPostId, or targetCommentId) is required.

400.description: Invalid report type, reason required, or no target specified

get.description: List all leagues with metadata, colors, and team counts. Optionally filtered by country.
Public endpoint returning the accessibility feature support matrix for native app and marketing site.

post.description: Upload a profile image (jpeg, png, webp, gif; max 5 MB). Updates the user's profileUrl and garbage-collects the old image.

400.description: No file, invalid type, or file too large

get.description: Returns the RevenueCat product-to-entitlement mapping generated from D-Sports Cash tiers and the Frontline Pass.
CORS proxy for whitelisted Thirdweb RPC and embedded-wallet endpoints.

post.description: CORS proxy for whitelisted Thirdweb RPC and embedded-wallet endpoints.
Create a Thirdweb link using the authenticated user's Clerk session. Returns userId and email.
Webhook triggered by GitHub Actions when changes are pushed to the leagues data repository. Validates x-webhook-secret header.

bearerAuth.description: Clerk session token. Use Authorization: Bearer <token>.
